name: Bar-b-Que Beef Spoonovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef with onion and green pepper in a pan until it turns lightly browned.
2. Remove the pan from heat and let any excess fat drain away.
3. Add tomato sauce (or catsup) and worcestershire sauce to the pan. Stir well.
4. Season with salt and pepper, to taste.
5. Mix everything together and allow the mixture to simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Spoon the mixture onto hamburger buns.
